overview: The School of Pharmaceutical Sciences and Technologies (Self-Finance) is an essential, specialized department of Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University, Kakinada (JNTUK) in Andhra Pradesh. Operating under the official state counseling code JNKPSF, the school combines university-grade academic systems with self-financed infrastructural frameworks. It focuses heavily on research-driven education across drug development, analysis, and clinical applications, preparing graduates directly for the pharmaceutical industrial belt of Andhra Pradesh.
accreditation: Approved by the Pharmacy Council of India (PCI) under Section 12; Constitutional Department of JNTU Kakinada (State Govt University).

coursesAndFees.tuitionFee: ₹38,000 – ₹45,000 per year (Estimated state counseling structured fee under SFS scheme).
₹50,000 – ₹90,000 per year (Subject to state council fixed framework components).

placements.avgSalary: ₹2.50 LPA – ₹3.50 LPA (Baseline core industry average package framework)
placements.highestSalary: ₹4.00 LPA – ₹5.00 LPA (Typically secured by postgraduate specialization candidates)
placements.highestDomestic: ₹5.00 LPA (Historical highest within the core pharmaceutical branch stream)
placements.placementRate: Core Pharmacy Streams: 30% – 40% on-campus selection rate (Remaining opt for higher studies or off-campus entry)
placements.totalOffers: 100+ offers across multi-batch departmental profiles and pool recruitment drives
placements.companiesVisited: Divis Laboratories, Aurobindo Pharma, Dr. Reddy’s Laboratories, Hetero Drugs, Apollo Pharmacy, MedPlus
placements.internshipHighlights: Industrial training programs tied directly to formulations units and clinical research networks across Vizag and Hyderabad belts

admissions.admissionProcess: Undergraduate entry is completely administered via AP EAPCET counseling (Code: JNKPSF). Postgraduate M.Pharma entry gives priority merit status to GPAT qualifiers followed by AP PGECET counseling rounds.
admissions.importantDates: Admissions systematically mirror the centralized timelines declared by the Andhra Pradesh State Council of Higher Education (APSCHE).

campus.area: Main University Campus (JNTUK Kakinada grounds total over 100+ acres shared framework)
campus.specialNote: Hostel room operations run via shared structures. Mess charges fluctuate strictly on a monthly billing system regulated by student committees based on actual dietary provisions.

hostelFees.BasicUniversityHostelRoom: ₹19,000 per year (Estimated non-AC standard room seat rent components)

contact.address: School of Pharmaceutical Sciences & Technologies, JNTUK Campus, Kakinada, East Godavari District, Andhra Pradesh – 533003, India

scholarships.meritScholarships: National level GPAT stipends mapped natively to qualifying PG candidates under AICTE-aligned parameters.
scholarships.fullWaiver: State tier rank concessions are administered if students align under reservation categories or specific full fee-reimbursement matrices.
scholarships.partialWaiver: Standard institutional fee splits apply according to specific category designations handled by state bodies.
scholarships.governmentAid: Eligible state candidates can actively apply for the Jagananna Amma Vodi / Vasathi Deevena or AP ePASS fee reimbursement networks.
